data.content: Plan complete for replacing single ReTake button with Stage + Retake Now buttons. Stage applies state change + notes only. Retake Now does the same then immediately starts a terminal session (Take!). Changes in retake-dialog.tsx (new mode param on onConfirm, two buttons) and retakes-view.tsx (import startSession/terminal store, branch on mode in mutation onSuccess). Low-medium complexity, 2 files.
